data.name: ErrorMessageNotFound
data.value: The error message for code {0} could not be found. Please report this missing message on GitHub at https://github.com/dotnet/macios/issues/new
data.comment: This is the default message when an error code can not be found.

data.name: SHARPIE0000
data.value: An unexpected error occurred: {0}. Please fill a bug report at https://github.com/dotnet/macios/issues.

data.name: SHARPIE0001
data.value: Unsupported construct: {0}. Generated bindings may be incomplete. Please file an issue at https://github.com/dotnet/macios/issues.

data.name: SHARPIE0002
data.value: The output directory must be specified.

data.name: SHARPIE0003
data.value: Failed to parse translation unit (error: {0}).

data.name: SHARPIE0004
data.value: Failed to create translation unit for unknown reasons. Please file an issue at https://github.com/dotnet/macios/issues.

data.name: SHARPIE0005
data.value: Compilation failed with error: {0}

data.name: SHARPIE0006
data.value: Failed to compute platform assembly location for the platform {0}: {1}

data.name: SHARPIE0007
data.value: Computed platform assembly path does not exist for the platform {0}: {1}

data.name: SHARPIE0008
data.value: Failed to compute the toolchain path for the platform '{0}': {1}

data.name: SHARPIE0009
data.value: Failed to the SDK path ('xcrun --show-sdk-path' failed): {0}

data.name: SHARPIE0010
data.value: The path to clang's resource directory is required.

data.name: SHARPIE0011
data.value: The specified clang resource directory does not exist: {0}

data.name: SHARPIE0012
data.value: Could not find the clang resource directory, because it doesn't look like we're executing from inside a NuGet.

data.name: SHARPIE0013
data.value: Could not find the clang resource directory, because the directory {0} doesn't exist.

data.name: SHARPIE0014
data.value: The framework '{0}' was specified in the excluded frameworks list but was not found in the SDK.

data.name: SHARPIE0015
data.value: Unknown argument: {0}

data.name: SHARPIE0016
data.value: Cannot specify both a source framework and a source file.

data.name: SHARPIE0017
data.value: The framework '{0}' doesn't exist.

data.name: SHARPIE0018
data.value: The framework '{0}' does not have an umbrella header or module map.

data.name: SHARPIE0099
data.value: Internal error: {0}. Please file an issue at https://github.com/dotnet/macios/issues.

data.name: SHARPIE1000
data.value: A warning occurred during compilation: {0}
